entries.title: Commentary on Lamentations on lamentations 3:54
entries.excerpt: Third, the very imprisonment of those imprisoned is exposed: "Water closed over my head; I said, 'I am lost'." Namely, the waters of tribulations are multiplied. Again: "I said, 'I am lost'." That is, desperately and impatiently. As the prophet Jonah reports: "All thy waves and thy billows passed over me" (Jonah 2:3).
